transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: The block absolves the reader and promises desire-free change, but shuffled fragments break its instructional sequence while retaining categorical health claims, clinic testimony, and extensive wording shared with B.
paraphrased_evidence.B: The block coherently makes changed perception the mechanism and rejects deprivation, yet uses alarming disease scenarios, sweeping food-drug equivalences, universal clinical claims, and guaranteed outcomes without adequate support.

parsed.generic_mechanism: A coherent sequence can dismantle a valued belief before behavior changes; scrambling that sequence makes obedience to isolated commands replace understanding.
